dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9523 IH: TPS Relief Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Moulton introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To permit judicial review of Temporary Protected Status (TPS) claims.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the TPS Relief Act.

section.header: Permitting judicial review of TPS claims
section.text: Section 1254(a)(b)(5)(A) of title 8, United States Code, is amended by striking out the word no.
